payload.answer: Duplicate Slack event detected; no new memory should be committed.

entity_resolution.reason: This appears to be a duplicate delivery of the same Slack event ID, so no new durable entity resolution is needed.

memory_cards.statement: A Slack event about Sam from Goldman liking Bill Evans was delivered twice with the same event ID.

details: Same Slack event ID received twice.

repair_options: If a distinct later event exists, provide a different Slack event ID.
If the original message was edited, supply the edited event payload rather than the duplicate delivery.
